title: Zoho Campaigns Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Zoho Campaigns worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Zoho Campaigns Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Zoho Campaigns is email marketing built into the zoho ecosystem that positions itself for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses. Founded in 2008, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Zoho Campaigns is a solid choice for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Zoho Campaigns offers a free plan, with paid plans from $4/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Zoho Campaigns works best for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Yes, Zoho Campaigns has a free plan supporting up to 2000 subscribers.

faq.q: What is Zoho Campaigns best used for?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns is best for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses. Its standout features include drag-drop editor, automation, crm integration.

faq.q: Is Zoho Campaigns good for beginners?
Does Zoho Campaigns have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Zoho Campaigns runs an affiliate program paying 15% recurring.
